layoutCalibrationProfile.label: Phase 0 real-layout assumption profile
layoutCalibrationProfile.sourceDescription: User CAD screenshot IMG_8078 plus public four-way pallet-shuttle references; dimensions are placeholders until CAD/vendor/site values are confirmed.

dimensions.label: Storage cell pitch X
dimensions.note: Placeholder for pallet position pitch along a FIFO storage row.

dimensions.label: Storage row pitch Z
dimensions.note: Placeholder for adjacent row center spacing inside a dense storage bank.

dimensions.label: Vertical aisle gap between storage islands
dimensions.note: Represents the yellow vertical shuttle corridors between column islands.

dimensions.label: Two-lane main corridor center spacing
dimensions.note: Modeled as two adjacent one-capacity lanes, not as one capacity-2 lane.

dimensions.label: Gap between upper/lower storage banks
dimensions.note: Approximate visible CAD label pending confirmation from a clean top-down drawing.

dimensions.label: Lift/transfer station standoff from outer aisle
Side spine clearance from storage block

notes: Single-floor simulation only; lifts are dedicated inbound/outbound black-box ports.
Storage cells are contiguous drivable track positions inside each island, not freestanding boxes.
All vehicle movement remains orthogonal; no diagonal shortcut edges are generated.
Blocked structural cells from the CAD screenshot are not encoded until exact CAD metadata is available.

calibrationReadiness.message: assumption calibration profile is incomplete (13 missing, 7 assumed, 7 low-confidence); throughput remains smoke-test only.
